LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: A R G U E D. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT RULED ON DEFENDANT SF OAKLAND BAY, LLC'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT AS FOLLOWS: THE TENTATIVE RULING STANDS AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION EXCEPT THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION. THE 1ST, 3RD, 4TH AND 5TH CAUSES OF ACTION ARE OVERRULED. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED FOR FURTHER HEARING TO JULY 9, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 303. PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE A SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF IN 2 WEEKS; OPPOSITION IS DUE 10 DAYS AFTER; REPLY IS DUE 10 DAYS AFTER. COURTESY COPIES SHALL BE DELIVERED TO DEPT. 303 AND EACH COUNSEL SHALL BRING A PROPOSED ORDER TO THE HEARING. THE COURT WILL NOT ISSUE AN ORDER UNTIL ALL MATTERS ARE RESOLVED. JUDGE: RICHARD KRAMER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-21-2013 Continued To Jul-09-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 303
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Corie A. Edwards, Esq. of Belzer Hulchiy & Murray, Tel. 925.284.9600, for defendant and moving party;
Kevin D. Frederick, Esq. of the Law Office of Kevin D. Frederick, Tel. 650.365.9800, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: A R G U E D. At the conclusion of argument, the Court ruled on DEFENDANT SF OAKLAND BAY, LLC'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT as follows: The tentative ruling stands as to all causes of action except the second cause of action. The 1st, 3rd, 4th and 5th causes of action are overruled. The matter is continued for further hearing to July 9, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 303. Plaintiff shall file a supplemental brief in 2 weeks; opposition is due 10 days after; reply is due 10 days after. Courtesy copies shall be delivered to Dept. 303 and each counsel shall bring a proposed order to the hearing. The Court will not issue an order until all matters are resolved. Judge: Richard Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
